title: Operational Risk and Resilience
gist: This is a BCG operational-risk practice landing page rather than an analytical article—mostly a four-step operating-model framework and client credentials. Genuine signals: the thesis that resilience is a competitive advantage (not just defense), a couple of client outcome data points, and a teased view that agentic AI will industrialize financial scams.

insights.claim: BCG argues best-in-class operational resilience risk management is a competitive advantage that not only avoids disruption but streamlines processes and creates value, requiring an operating model built on governance, processes, roles, and culture.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: Reframes risk function from cost center to value driver—relevant to assessing operational quality at banks and complex operators.
insights.quote: best-of-breed resilience risk management is a competitive advantage.
insights.locator: BCG’s Approach to Operational Risk and Resilience

insights.claim: BCG reshaped the risk organization for a European bank to cut costs by up to 20%, and helped a fintech startup grow partners from 14 to 25 and deploy three risk scorecards in six months.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: Quantifies the opex and growth upside of risk-function transformation—useful magnitude for cost-efficiency theses in financials.
insights.quote: reshaped the risk organization for a European bank, developing an action plan to boost effectiveness while reducing costs by up to 20%.

insights.claim: BCG flags (via a linked article teaser) that agentic AI will industrialize financial scams and fraud, forcing banks to leverage AI to ready their defenses.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: AI-driven fraud at scale is an emerging operational-risk and cybersecurity-spend driver for financial institutions.
insights.quote: As agentic systems turbocharge the pace of financial fraud and scams, banks must leverage AI to ready their defenses.
insights.locator: Our Insights — Agentic AI Will Industrialize Financial Scams
